name: Secondary Action: The 12 Basic Principles of Animation
snippet: Secondary action is something else the character is doing, something on top of or in addition to the primary action.

name: Engage Your Audience with Secondary Animation
snippet: Secondary animation is any additional animation that emphasizes the main action to create more dimension or personify a character.

name: Module 10 - Secondary Action - Animation I - Principles
snippet: Secondary action is generally related to objects that are moving as a result of a main action or are moving to support the main action.
